title: MC Reworked
description: A rework of Minecraft to re-explore ! With multiplayer support ! (MC 1.21.4)
body:
**Message from July 25 2025 :** The next version will be Beta 4.0.0, the vision of this modpack will change (and all your worlds will be incompatible)

**Message from July 5 2025 :** I'm focusing on [Lumina Fables](https://modrinth.com/modpack/luminafables) so there will be little to no updates, sorry

# MC Reworked
A rework of Minecraft to re-explore !

✔️ QoL Features

✔️ Shaders and Resources Packs Support

✔️ Multiplayer Support

✔️ Overhauled World Generation

✔️ New Structures

✔️ Xaero's World Map and Xaero's Minimap

✔️ 140+ advancements to unlock
## 🖥️Hardware
### Minimum :
- CPU : 6-core processor at 3.2+ GHz
- GPU : Graphics card with 4GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 4GB
- Free Storage : 4GB
- Java : Java 21
### Recommended :
- CPU : 8-core processor at 3.6+ GHz
- GPU : Graphics card with 6GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 6.4GB
- Free Storage : 8GB
- Java : Java 21
## 📈Performance
- **FPS** : Min : ~100 FPS | **AVG : ~180 FPS** | Max : ~200-240 FPS
- 12 Render Distence, Graphics Fancy, 4Gb Dedicated RAM

- Tested with : Ryzen 5 7535HS, RTX 4060 Laptop, 16Gb RAM (Tested in Beta 3.0.7 1.21.4)
## 📫FAQ
- I found a bug, how to report it ? : Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/pcGmgzm4TZ)

- Can y use MC Reworked as a base in my modpack ? : No
## ❓Others
- MC Reworked is based on [Lumina Fables](https://modrinth.com/modpack/radiummodpack)
- The CPU and GPU requirements in this description were generated using AI (which may not be accurate)

<details>
<summary>🧪 Versionning</summary>

## 🔍 Versioning Breakdown
- X : Major version (Breaking changes)
- Y : Medium version (Minecraft updates or world generation changes)
- Z : Minor version (Mod/Config updates or others things)

## 📌 Version Format
- Stable : Stage X.Y.Z MC (Release, tested and stable)
- Pre-release : Stage X.Y.Z Pre-X MC (Test version, may contain bugs)
## ⚠️ Pre-Release
- Pre Release = Test version, potentially with bugs and not polite

**⚠️ Note:** Pre-release versions will be marked as Alpha (untested) or Beta (partially tested).
</details>
